title: Gallium
description: A minecraft mod that adds High-performance Quake-style movement
body:
# MAIN
Gallium re-engineers Minecraft’s movement engine to bring the iconic fluid physics of classic arena shooters into the blocky world. Forget the sluggish, friction-heavy walking of vanilla—Gallium introduces high-velocity air-strafing and frame-perfect bunny hopping.

## # Important:
You need Fabric Loader " 0.18.4 " in order for this mod to work.

WARNING! This mod was tested in the versions below:

1.21.1

You have been warned.


## " Additions " :

When the left-shift button is pressed there is a %15 chance that the player's speed will increase about 0.4 B/S (blocks a second). Which is about 96% chance in 1 second (i dont know why i added this)

### Note:

This is my first mod ever. So expect some bugs :D
